known_gaps.detail: routes/dsar.ts (6 routes) and the suppression-log write in routes/email-webhooks.ts are still PHASE_1_STUB 503s; 'restored in Phase 2' comments never actioned. Not a numbered requirement; creator bot DSAR path (COMPLY-04) is complete.

decisions.decision: GSD roadmap resynced to actual built state
decisions.rationale: v1.0 Launch Sprint (Phases 1–4) is complete; .planning/ROADMAP.md now reflects this and adds v2.0 (Phases 5–9) tracking the docs/roadmap.md initiatives

decisions.decision: docs/roadmap.md is the canonical product roadmap
decisions.rationale: Forward initiatives (marketing site, concierge, image, video, content studio) live there; GSD tracker cross-links to it

next_action: Plan v2.0 Phase 5 (Lala.la marketing site) via the GSD flow; see docs/roadmap.md §1
context_notes: v1.0 Launch Sprint complete: 27/27 plans across Phases 1–4. Code-complete; founder runtime UAT outstanding on Phases 2 and 3. v2.0 Full Twin Platform (Phases 5–9) is the forward plan, detailed in docs/roadmap.md. Branch: rio-de-janeiro.
